filesModified.purpose: Fix 1: Replaced custom VideoFileControl (MediaUpload + Flex + Icon + fetchMedia) with MediaUploadPanel from @taktdev/components. Fix 2: Replaced inline SVG markup with imported TertiaryArrow SVG component via ReactComponent named export using resources alias. Also fixed two curly lint errors (braceless if-returns inside useSelect callback).

Fix 1: Replaced custom VideoFileControl (MediaUpload + MediaUploadCheck + Flex + Icon + fetchMedia) with MediaUploadPanel from @taktdev/components. Removed now-unused imports: MediaUpload, MediaUploadCheck, Flex, FlexItem, FlexBlock, Icon, fetchMedia, videoIcon, Button.

syncStatus.note: CPT block — no PHP render file. N/A.

fixesApplied.description: Replaced VideoFileControl with MediaUploadPanel in both TestimonialCPT.tsx and testimonial-cpt-panel.tsx. MediaUploadPanel is called with: media={meta.videoFile}, label, allowedTypes={['video']}, onSelect={(media) => updateMeta('videoFile', media.id)}, enableFocalPoint={false}. All previously custom imports (Flex, FlexItem, FlexBlock, Icon, fetchMedia, videoIcon, MediaUpload, MediaUploadCheck, Button where video-only) removed.

Replaced 289-char inline <svg> path for arrow with: import { ReactComponent as TertiaryArrow } from 'resources/images/tertiary-arrow.svg' and <TertiaryArrow /> in JSX. The resources alias in webpack.config.js resolve.alias resolves this to /var/www/ign/wp-content/themes/ign/resources. The wrapper <span className="w-5 h-4 *:w-full *:h-full"> unchanged, matching parts/card-testimonial.php structure.

Fixed two curly rule violations in the useSelect programTerms callback: 'if (!postId) return []' and 'if (!termIds.length) return []' converted to block-form with braces to satisfy the eslint curly rule.
